label: Prismshade Bedchamber
description: Prismshade Bedchamber is a compact sleeping room partitioned by translucent slagglass that breaks Seamglass Meridian’s calibrated twilight into disciplined color bars across the walls. A low sleeping plinth of fused silicate stands above a recessed floor channel that carries fine electrostatic glass dust toward the house’s grounded gutters. Facet-laid tiles form a hard, clean geometry underfoot, their glaze tuned to reduce glare from the dwelling’s lensing cistern reflections. A shallow ceiling baffle of mirror slats aligns with the city’s auroral timekeeping regimen, fixing the room’s light into stable bands for rest and waking.
